name: Meike 33mm f/1.4 AF Lens
description: A versatile normal-length autofocus prime lens, the 33mm f/1.4 AF Lens from Meike is a reliable choice for capturing portraits, everyday scenes, and creating images with standout bokeh.

features.Key Features:: APS-C | f/1.4 to f/16 | 50mm Full-Frame Equivalent | Fast, Normal Length Prime | Autofocus Design
features.What's in the box?: Meike 33mm f/1.4 AF Lens (Sony E) | Front Lens Cap | Rear Lens Cap | Lens Hood
